docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED AUG-07-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, SILU
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $205.00 FILED BY SHEK, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, SILU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. DEFENDANT INFORM THE COURT THAT HIS TRUE AND CORRECT NAME IS SILU CHEN NOT SHU CHEN. PLAINTIFF DAVID SHEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SILU CHEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEK, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, SILU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
